name: Barbell Squat
cues: Keep chest up, hips back, break parallel.

name: Bench Press
cues: Retract scapula, touch mid-chest, drive with legs.

name: Deadlift
cues: Flat back, bar close to shins, drive through heels.

name: Overhead Press
cues: Tight core, press overhead, head through the window.

name: Pull Up
cues: Full extension, chin over bar, controlled descent.

name: Bicep Curl
cues: Keep elbows tucked, full range of motion.

name: Tricep Pushdown
cues: Keep elbows still, squeeze at the bottom.

name: Lateral Raise
cues: Slight bend in elbows, lead with pinkies.
